Center: Center of Nuclear Physics Data, Russian Federal Nuclear Center (VNIIEF), Sarov, Russia
title: The Li-6(p,alpha)He-3 reaction

x4freetext: The Li-6(p,alpha)He-3 reaction
6Li(99.6%) metal targets deposited
on 10 ug/cm2 carbon backings. The thickness of the
6Li in the targets was of the order of 10 ug/cm2.
Solid state counter was used as particle detec.
from 20 degr. to 80 degr. in the lab. system in steps
of around 5 degr. in most cases.
A solid state detector fixed at 90 degr. served as
monitor. Only the 3He pulses of the monitor were used
for normalizing data.
Statistical error
The excitation curves obtained from 1.9 MeV to 5 MeV
for various angles were corrected for solid angle and
normalized to the monitor.
Compilation produced by Arzamas RFNC-VNIIEF
CNPD: corrected 4-dig. year and lower cases.
SD: Corrections in all Subents.
DATA-ERR1 -> ERR-S.

x4freetext: Using measured Legendre coefficients and the principle
of detailed balance the excitation curve as a function
of incident energy was normalized to the data from
Tombrello et al.
